units.prompt: The Chinese word for the grain you eat daily (rice)
The Chinese word for long thin flour food (noodles)
The Chinese word for the clear liquid you drink (water)
The Chinese word for the hot drink made from leaves (tea)
The Chinese word for a red or green sweet fruit (apple)
The Chinese word for the bird meat people eat (chicken)
The Chinese word for the animal that swims (fish)
The Chinese word for the round food from hens (egg)
The Chinese word for the white drink from cows (milk)
The Chinese word for the baked flour food (bread)
